items.title: Aggressive Primary Sacral Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma Associated With Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
items.abstract: In this case report, we discuss a 36-year-old female patient diagnosed with a rare and aggressive sacral non-Hodgkin lymphoma. The patient presented with a rapidly progressive low back pain radiating to both lower limbs and, following a neurosurgical resection, was diagnosed with sacral non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Sacral involvement is rare among bone pathologies, accounting for only 1-7% of all spinal tumors. The association of this neoplasm with systemic lupus erythematosus at this anatomical site is uncommon and was correlated with an aggressive clinical course in our patient. Magnetic resonance imaging revealed lytic and infiltrative lesions involving the sacrum and L4 on T1- and T2-weighted sequences. Histopathological and immunohistochemical analyses confirmed a diagnosis of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, expressing CD20, Bcl-6, Bcl-2, CD10, PAX-5, MUM-1, and c-MYC, with a high proliferative index (Ki-67: 90%), and negative for CD3, CK AE1/AE3, CD30, and TdT. During disease progression, the patient developed multiple metastases involving the brain, breast, lung, and submandibular lymph node. Despite treatment with combined chemotherapy and radiotherapy, the aggressive nature of the disease resulted in a poor prognosis.

items.titleZh: 与系统性红斑狼疮相关的侵袭性原发性骶骨非霍奇金淋巴瘤
items.abstractZh: 在本病例报告中，我们讨论了一名36岁女性患者，被诊断为罕见的侵袭性骶骨非霍奇金淋巴瘤。患者表现为快速进展的下背部疼痛，放射至双下肢，在神经外科切除术后，被诊断为骶骨非霍奇金淋巴瘤。骶骨受累在骨病变中罕见，仅占所有脊柱肿瘤的1-7%。该肿瘤在此解剖部位与系统性红斑狼疮的关联并不常见，并且与我们的患者侵袭性临床病程相关。磁共振成像显示T1和T2加权序列上涉及骶骨和L4的溶骨性和浸润性病变。组织病理学和免疫组织化学分析证实为弥漫性大B细胞淋巴瘤，表达CD20、Bcl-6、Bcl-2、CD10、PAX-5、MUM-1和c-MYC，增殖指数高（Ki-67: 90%），CD3、CK AE1/AE3、CD30和TdT阴性。在疾病进展过程中，患者出现多处转移，累及脑、乳腺、肺和颌下淋巴结。尽管接受了联合化疗和放疗，但疾病的侵袭性导致预后不良。

items.title: Incidence, prevalence and mortality of rheumatoid arthritis in general practice in New Zealand.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic inflammatory condition that affects the joints, skin, eyes, lungs, heart, blood vessels, and nervous system. This study aims to estimate the incidence and prevalence of RA in New Zealand and compare the mortality of RA patients with the general population. Patients with a SNOMED CT code for RA in 2018-2025 were identified from the Pinnacle dataset. The WHO (World Health Organization) age-standardised rate (ASR) of incidence and prevalence of RA were calculated by ethnicity and gender (women and men). The standardised mortality ratio (SMR) was estimated to compare the relative rate of observed deaths in RA patients with the expected deaths in the general population. We identified 3831 RA patients during the study period. The age-standardised incidence of RA was 26.9 (95% CI: 22.8-30.9) per 100,000 population. Women (34.8, 95% CI: 28.3-41.3, per 100,000) had around twice the incidence of RA than men (18.2, 95% CI: 13.5-22.9). The age-standardised prevalence of RA was 417.5 (95% CI: 402.8-432.1) per 100,000 population. The prevalence was 583.0 (95% CI: 558.8-607.2) per 100,000 for women and 237.6 (95% CI: 221.8-253.3) for men. Asians had the highest age-standardised incidence but the lowest age-standardised prevalence among all ethnic groups. The SMR of all the incident RA patients compared to the general population was 1.07 (95% CI: 0.80-1.34). The prevalence of RA in general practice aligns with rates observed in secondary care settings. The upward trend in RA prevalence raises concerns about escalating healthcare system burdens, including increased costs and resource demands. The rise in RA prevalence was driven by increasing incidence among Asian populations.

items.title: A cost-optimized 5-protein panel revolutionizes systemic lupus erythematosus diagnosis.
items.abstract: Early diagnosis of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is hindered by a lack of reliable biomarkers. This study sought to identify and evaluate diagnostic plasma protein biomarkers for SLE. We analyzed plasma protein profiles, polygenic risk scores (PRS), and clinical data from 544 SLE cases and 48,036 controls in the UK Biobank. Using LASSO regression, we identified 35 high-confidence SLE-associated proteins and derived a protein risk score (ProtRS). The ProtRS model achieved exceptional diagnostic performance (AUC = 0.91), significantly outperforming models based on PRS or clinical factors alone. Notably, a cost-optimized 5-protein panel (TRIM21, SOD2, KLK3, IL15, ADIPOQ) retained high accuracy (AUC = 0.82) while reducing costs by ~87%. ProtRS also demonstrated the highest population attributable fraction (96.34%), underscoring its dominant contribution to SLE burden. This study establishes a protein-driven framework for early SLE detection, offering tiered diagnostic solutions to balance accuracy and cost. The findings underscore the translational potential of protein biomarkers in bridging theoretical research and clinical practice.

items.title: Neutrophil/Lymphocyte Ratio as a Diagnostic Tool to Distinguish Infection From Disease Reactivation in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: An Analytical Observational Study.
items.abstract: Differentiating between infection and flare in patients with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) presents a clinical challenge due to the overlap of clinical manifestations and laboratory findings. The neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (NLR) has been proposed as an accessible marker of systemic inflammation. The aim was to evaluate the association and diagnostic performance of NLR in identifying infection and differentiating it from a flare in patients with SLE. A longitudinal analytical observational study was conducted at the Víctor Lazarte Echegaray Hospital (Peru) between January 2019 and June 2025. 213 patients with SLE were included, of whom 136 presented with flares and 77 with infection. The NLR was calculated from the complete blood count at the time of clinical evaluation. Its association with infection was assessed using logistic regression, and its diagnostic performance was evaluated using receiver operating characteristic ROC curves, comparing it with C-reactive protein (CRP). The NLR was significantly higher in patients with infection. In logistic regression analysis, elevated NLR values were associated with infection (OR: 1.25; 95% CI: 1.15-1.36; p<0.001), remaining significant after adjustment (adjusted OR: 1.18; 95% CI: 1.08-1.30; p<0.001). The NLR showed excellent discriminative ability (AUC: 0.97), with a cutoff point of 6.8, sensitivity of 90%, and specificity of 92%. C-reactive protein (CRP) showed similar performance (AUC: 0.97). The combined model increased sensitivity to 97% and reduced the negative likelihood ratio to 0.03. NLR is a simple, accessible, and low-cost marker that allows differentiation between infection and flare in patients with SLE, with diagnostic performance comparable to that of CRP. Its combined use can improve clinical decision-making in hospital settings.

items.titleZh: 中性粒细胞/淋巴细胞比值作为区分系统性红斑狼疮感染与疾病复发的诊断工具：一项分析性观察研究
items.abstractZh: 区分系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者的感染与复发在临床上具有挑战性，因为临床表现和实验室检查结果存在重叠。中性粒细胞与淋巴细胞比值（NLR）已被提出作为一种可获取的系统性炎症标志物。本研究旨在评估NLR在识别SLE患者感染并区分其与复发方面的关联性和诊断性能。在秘鲁Víctor Lazarte Echegaray医院进行了一项纵向分析性观察研究，时间从2019年1月至2025年6月。共纳入213例SLE患者，其中136例出现复发，77例出现感染。NLR根据临床评估时的全血细胞计数计算得出。使用逻辑回归评估其与感染的关联，并使用受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线评估其诊断性能，并与C反应蛋白（CRP）进行比较。感染患者的NLR显著升高。在逻辑回归分析中，NLR升高与感染相关（OR: 1.25; 95% CI: 1.15-1.36; p<0.001），校正后仍显著（校正OR: 1.18; 95% CI: 1.08-1.30; p<0.001）。NLR显示出极好的区分能力（AUC: 0.97），截断值为6.8，敏感性为90%，特异性为92%。C反应蛋白（CRP）表现出相似的性能（AUC: 0.97）。联合模型将敏感性提高至97%，并将阴性似然比降至0.03。NLR是一种简单、可获取且低成本的标志物，能够区分SLE患者的感染与复发，其诊断性能与CRP相当。联合使用可改善医院环境中的临床决策。

items.title: Differential methylation of immune-related genes and its clinical significance in systemic lupus erythematosus: insights from TET2, FOXP3, and IFI44L genes.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a heterogeneous autoimmune disease with challenging early diagnosis and effective monitoring due to the limited performance of current biomarkers. Recent research suggests that epigenetic dysregulation, specifically DNA methylation changes in immune-related genes like TET2, FOXP3, and IFI44L, plays a significant role in SLE development and could offer new biomarkers for enhanced diagnosis and comprehensive disease monitoring. A total of 102 patients with SLE and 105 healthy controls were enrolled in this study. Following the isolation of PBMCs, the promoter methylation levels of TET2, FOXP3, and IFI44L were quantified using the methylation-quantification of endonuclease-resistant DNA (MethyQESD) method. The methylation data were subsequently analyzed to assess diagnostic performance and associations with clinical characteristics. Promoter methylation of IFI44L was significantly lower in SLE patients compared to healthy controls (P < 0.001) and demonstrated good diagnostic performance (sensitivity = 86.3%, specificity = 74.3%, AUC = 0.847). However, methylation levels of FOXP3 and TET2 did not show significant differences between the two groups. Besides, higher FOXP3 methylation was observed in early-onset SLE patients and those with renal involvement, characterized by positive correlations with CRP and anti-dsDNA antibodies, and negative correlations with complement C3 and C4 levels. TET2 methylation was shown to be elevated in early-onset patients and positively correlated with ESR and anti-dsDNA levels (P < 0.05). Promoter methylation of IFI44L, FOXP3, and TET2 plays critical roles in SLE pathogenesis. IFI44L hypomethylation may serve as a diagnostic biomarker, while methylation of FOXP3 and TET2 reflects disease activity, early-onset disease, and renal involvement.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中免疫相关基因的差异甲基化及其临床意义：TET2、FOXP3和IFI44L基因的见解
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种异质性自身免疫性疾病，由于当前生物标志物的性能有限，早期诊断和有效监测具有挑战性。最近的研究表明，表观遗传失调，特别是免疫相关基因如TET2、FOXP3和IFI44L的DNA甲基化变化，在SLE发展中起重要作用，并可能为增强诊断和全面疾病监测提供新的生物标志物。本研究共纳入102名SLE患者和105名健康对照。分离外周血单个核细胞后，使用甲基化定量核酸内切酶抗性DNA（MethyQESD）方法定量TET2、FOXP3和IFI44L的启动子甲基化水平。随后分析甲基化数据以评估诊断性能及与临床特征的相关性。与健康对照相比，SLE患者中IFI44L的启动子甲基化显著降低（P < 0.001），并显示出良好的诊断性能（灵敏度=86.3%，特异度=74.3%，AUC=0.847）。然而，FOXP3和TET2的甲基化水平在两组之间未显示出显著差异。此外，在早发性SLE患者和伴有肾脏受累的患者中观察到较高的FOXP3甲基化，其特征是与CRP和抗dsDNA抗体呈正相关，与补体C3和C4水平呈负相关。TET2甲基化在早发性患者中升高，并与ESR和抗dsDNA水平呈正相关（P < 0.05）。IFI44L、FOXP3和TET2的启动子甲基化在SLE发病机制中起关键作用。IFI44L低甲基化可作为诊断生物标志物，而FOXP3和TET2的甲基化反映疾病活动、早发性疾病和肾脏受累。

items.title: Pictorial insights into high-resolution ultrasound for various subtypes of juvenile idiopathic arthritis.
items.abstract: Juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) remains a diagnostic challenge because of its heterogeneous clinical and radiological presentation. High-resolution ultrasonography (HR-USG) has emerged as an indispensable imaging modality for diagnosis, image-guided interventions, and follow-up. A thorough understanding of the sonographic findings, combined with clinical correlation, is essential for both trainees and practicing radiologists involved in the management of these patients. This review highlights the key clinicoradiological features of JIA, with particular emphasis on the imaging characteristics of the different JIA subtypes, their patterns of joint involvement, and potential imaging pitfalls, thereby facilitating accurate diagnosis and early treatment.

items.titleZh: 幼年特发性关节炎各亚型高分辨率超声的影像学见解
items.abstractZh: 幼年特发性关节炎（JIA）因其异质性的临床和影像学表现，仍是一个诊断挑战。高分辨率超声（HR-USG）已成为诊断、影像引导干预和随访中不可或缺的成像方式。透彻理解超声表现并结合临床相关性，对于参与这些患者管理的受训者和执业放射科医生至关重要。本综述重点介绍JIA的关键临床影像学特征，特别强调不同JIA亚型的影像学特点、关节受累模式及潜在的影像学陷阱，从而促进准确诊断和早期治疗。

items.title: Efficacy of Lasers and Light Sources for Telangiectasias in the Setting of Systemic Sclerosis and Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Review.
items.abstract: Lasers and light sources are effective treatment modalities for numerous vascular conditions of the skin, including rosacea and port-wine capillary malformations. While they are widely accepted as effective therapies for sporadic idiopathic telangiectasias, there is limited data regarding their efficacy in treating telangiectasias that occur due to connective tissue diseases (CTD) of systemic sclerosis (SSc) and lupus erythematosus (LE). The primary objective of this review is to analyse data on the effectiveness of lasers and light sources in treating SSc and LE associated telangiectasias. Ultimately, we hope that this will help guide physicians in managing these telangiectasias. A PubMed search was conducted March 2025 on the efficacy of lasers and light based devices known to help with vascular lesions in treating telangiectasias associated with a variety of connective tissue diseases including SSc, LE, dermatomyositis, mixed CTD, and morphea. Ultimately, 10 full-text articles met inclusion criteria. Available studies only investigated the use of either pulsed dye laser (PDL) or intense pulsed light (IPL) for telangiectasias within the context of SSc and LE, and thus these conditions became the focus of our review. All 10 articles demonstrated that PDL or IPL resulted in an improvement in telangiectasias associated with SSc and LE. In seven of the studies, there was both a reduction in the number of telangiectasias and overall visual improvement after PDL treatment. In all 4 studies that accounted for patient perspective, all subjects reported satisfaction with treatment and endorsed a better quality of life after PDL. Two studies suggested that telangiectasias secondary to SSc or LE may be more recalcitrant than sporadic telangiectasias, necessitating a greater number of treatments. One study found that PDL may be more effective than IPL when comparing clinical photographs and dermoscopic findings. All adverse events were transient and have also been seen in treatment of sporadic telangiectasias. No studies reported exacerbation of the underlying SSc or LE. Overall, PDL and IPL appear to be relatively safe and effective treatments for managing SSc and SLE-associated telangiectasias. More treatment sessions may be required compared to sporadic idiopathic telangiectasias. Future randomized controlled studies with more objective outcomes would help better characterize the effect of light-based devices in this unique patient population.

items.title: Placental malperfusion and angiogenesis-related proteins are associated with small-for-gestational-age in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Although systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) pregnancy frequently results in small for gestational age (SGA) infants, the understanding of underlying mechanisms is limited. We aimed to identify specific histological patterns of placental injury in SGA in SLE and to explore whether an altered balance of angiogenesis-related proteins precedes this outcome. We prospectively followed 83 SLE and 67 control pregnancies. Placental histological patterns were determined according to the Amsterdam consensus in 63 women with SLE (76%), of whom 10 developed SGA. Soluble fms-like tyrosine kinase 1 (sFlt-1) and placental growth factor (PlGF) in plasma were quantified using LEGENDplex in the first, second and third trimesters. SLE patients remain at risk of having an SGA infant, and their placentas and infants had lower weight compared to controls. In placentas from women with SLE and SGA, maternal vascular malperfusion lesions were common (80% vs. 30% in controls; p = 0.010), but inflammatory lesions were not observed. Women with maternal vascular malperfusion gave birth to infants with lower birth weight compared to women without these lesions. The ratio of sFlt-1:PlGF in the third trimester was elevated in women with SLE with an SGA infant. In a prospective cohort of well-controlled SLE patients with low disease activity delivering mostly at term, SGA and small placentas remain common. The increased prevalence of placental malperfusion lesions together with an altered balance of pro- and anti-angiogenic proteins suggests that the role of vascular and angiogenesis-related factors should be further explored in relation to SGA in SLE pregnancy.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中胎盘灌注不良和血管生成相关蛋白与小于胎龄儿相关
items.abstractZh: 尽管系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）妊娠常导致小于胎龄儿（SGA），但对潜在机制的理解有限。我们旨在确定SLE中SGA的胎盘损伤特异性组织学模式，并探讨血管生成相关蛋白的平衡改变是否先于这一结局。我们前瞻性随访了83例SLE和67例对照妊娠。根据阿姆斯特丹共识确定了63例SLE女性（76%）的胎盘组织学模式，其中10例发展为SGA。使用LEGENDplex在妊娠早期、中期和晚期定量血浆中的可溶性fms样酪氨酸激酶1（sFlt-1）和胎盘生长因子（PlGF）。SLE患者仍有发生SGA婴儿的风险，其胎盘和婴儿体重低于对照组。在SLE合并SGA女性的胎盘中，母体血管灌注不良病变常见（80% vs. 对照30%；p = 0.010），但未观察到炎症病变。有母体血管灌注不良的女性所生婴儿的出生体重低于无这些病变的女性。妊娠晚期sFlt-1:PlGF比值在SLE合并SGA女性中升高。在一项疾病活动度低、大多足月分娩的病情控制良好的SLE患者前瞻性队列中，SGA和小胎盘仍然常见。胎盘灌注不良病变患病率增加以及促血管生成和抗血管生成蛋白平衡改变提示，应进一步探讨血管和血管生成相关因素在SLE妊娠中SGA发生中的作用。

items.title: [PRISM for prioritizing disease-related topics in inpatient systemic sclerosis assessment: A descriptive-qualitative study].
items.abstract: PRISM for prioritizing disease-related topics in inpatient systemic sclerosis assessment: A descriptive-qualitative study Abstract: Background: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is a rare disease characterized by heterogeneous clinical courses. The wide range of disease-related issues is perceived as a complex burden of disease. The Systemic Sclerosis Assessment (SScA) currently lacks a tool that supports patients in independently prioritizing these issues. The Pictorial Representation of Illness and Self Measure (PRISM) could be suitable for this purpose. Aims: This study examines which factors healthcare professionals (HCPs) in nursing, occupational therapy, and management in an inpatient rheumatology setting perceive as influencing the implementation of PRISM into the SScA. Additionally, the experiences of SSc-patients with PRISM in the prioritization of disease-related issues will be highlighted. Methods: In this primarily qualitative, multi-method process evaluation, semi-structured interviews were conducted with five HCPs and 14 patients, along with an in-depth, standardized survey of the interdisciplinary team, followed by a descriptive analysis. Results: The HCPs found PRISM helpful in better understanding the context of the patient's situation. Patients felt that PRISM made them feel seen and taken seriously in shared decision-making. PRISM enabled visual prioritization of topics in the SScA. The sample size allows only for context-specific findings. Conclusions: PRISM shows potential in the SScA for visualizing disease-related topics. Further conceptual clarification regarding standardized application is necessary prior to broader implementation. Zusammenfassung: Hintergrund: Die Systemsklerose (SSc) als seltene Erkrankung zeigt heterogene Verläufe. Die Vielfalt an krankheitsassoziierten Themen wird als komplexe Krankheitslast wahrgenommen. Im Systemsklerose Assessment (SScA) fehlt ein Instrument, das die Patient_innen in der autonomen Priorisierung dieser Themen unterstützt. Das Pictorial Representation of Illness and Self Measure (PRISM) könnte sich dafür eignen. Ziele: Diese Studie untersucht, welche Einflussfaktoren Gesundheitsfachpersonen (GFP) der Pflege, Ergotherapie und Management im rheumatologisch-stationären Setting auf eine Implementation von PRISM ins SScA sehen. Zudem wird das Erleben von SSc-Patient_innen zu PRISM in der thematischen Priorisierung krankheitsassoziierter Themen aufgezeigt. Methoden: In dieser primär qualitativ ausgerichteten, multimethodischen Prozessevaluation erfolgten semistrukturierte Interviews mit fünf GFP und 14 Patient_innen, sowie eine vertiefende, standardisierte Befragung im interdisziplinären Team mit deskriptiver Auswertung. Ergebnisse: Die GFP erlebten PRISM als hilfreich, um Zusammenhänge der Patientensituation besser zu verstehen. Die Patient_innen fühlten sich durch PRISM im Shared Decision Making gesehen und ernst genommen. PRISM ermöglichte im SScA eine visuelle Priorisierung der Themen. Die Stichprobengrösse lässt nur kontextgebundene Erkenntnisse zu. Schlussfolgerungen: PRISM zeigt im SScA Potenzial, krankheitsassoziierte Themen zu visualisieren. Vor einer breiteren Implementierung sind weitere konzeptionelle Klärungen zur standardisierten Anwendung nötig.

items.titleZh: PRISM用于住院系统性硬化症评估中疾病相关主题的优先排序：一项描述性质性研究
items.abstractZh: 背景：系统性硬化症（SSc）是一种罕见疾病，临床病程异质性大。广泛的疾病相关问题被视为复杂的疾病负担。系统性硬化症评估（SScA）目前缺乏一种工具来支持患者独立优先处理这些问题。疾病与自我测量图示（PRISM）可能适用于此目的。目的：本研究探讨在住院风湿病学环境中，护理、职业治疗和管理领域的医疗专业人员（GFP）认为哪些因素影响PRISM在SScA中的实施。此外，还将突出SSc患者在使用PRISM优先处理疾病相关问题时的体验。方法：在这项主要定性的多方法过程评估中，对5名GFP和14名患者进行了半结构化访谈，并对跨学科团队进行了深入的标准化调查，随后进行描述性分析。结果：GFP认为PRISM有助于更好地理解患者情况的背景。患者感到PRISM让他们在共同决策中被看见和认真对待。PRISM使得SScA中的主题可视化优先排序成为可能。样本量仅允许得出特定背景下的结论。结论：PRISM在SScA中显示出可视化疾病相关主题的潜力。在更广泛实施之前，需要进一步明确标准化应用的概念。

items.title: Heart Failure in Young Women with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
items.abstract: We present two cases (females aged 23 and 36 years) with newly diagnosed systemic lupus erythematosus who developed lupus myocarditis concurrent with lupus nephritis. Both exhibited acute decompensated heart failure with dyspnea, edema, and cardiomegaly. Common key findings included strongly positive ANA blot, nephrotic-range proteinuria, acute kidney injury, and markedly elevated NT-proBNP (>35,000 pg/mL). Transthoracic echocardiography confirmed biventricular dysfunction (left ventricular ejection fraction [LVEF]: 20%-35% initially), moderate-to-severe tricuspid regurgitation, moderate-to-severe pulmonary arterial hypertension, and mild pericardial effusions. Both received high-dose pulse dexamethasone (40-60 mg IV), hydroxychloroquine (HCQ), diuretics, beta-blockers, SGLT2 inhibitors, and HCQ. The fulminant case additionally underwent plasma exchange. Both the patients, over the next few weeks, received cyclophosphamide therapy and achieved LVEF recovery to 50%-55% within 1-2 months, with improved renal function and resolution of heart failure symptoms. These cases underscore the reversibility of lupus myocarditis with early aggressive immunosuppression. Résumé Nous présentons deux cas (femmes de 23 et 36 ans) chez lesquelles un lupus érythémateux systémique a été récemment diagnostiqué et qui ont développé une myocardite lupique concomitamment à une néphrite lupique. Toutes deux présentaient une insuffisance cardiaque aiguë décompensée avec dyspnée, œdème et cardiomégalie. Les principaux signes cliniques communs comprenaient un test ANA fortement positif, une protéinurie de type néphrotique, une insuffisance rénale aiguë et un taux de NT-proBNP nettement élevé (> 35 000 pg/mL). L’échocardiographie transthoracique a confirmé une dysfonction biventriculaire (fraction d’éjection ventriculaire gauche [FEVG] : 20 %–35 % initialement), une insuffisance tricuspidienne modérée à sévère, une hypertension artérielle pulmonaire modérée à sévère et un épanchement péricardique léger. Les deux patients ont reçu de fortes doses de dexaméthasone en bolus (40 à 60 mg IV), de l’hydroxychloroquine (HCQ), des diurétiques, des bêta-bloquants, des inhibiteurs du SGLT2 et de l’HCQ. La patiente présentant une forme fulminante a également bénéficié d’échanges plasmatiques. Au cours des semaines suivantes, les deux patientes ont reçu un traitement par cyclophosphamide et ont présenté une récupération de la fraction d’éjection ventriculaire gauche (FEVG) à 50-55 % en 1 à 2 mois, avec une amélioration de la fonction rénale et une résolution des symptômes d’insuffisance cardiaque. Ces cas soulignent la réversibilité de la myocardite lupique grâce à une immunosuppression précoce et intensive.

items.title: Anti-transcription Intermediary Factor-1 Gamma Antibody-positive Dermatomyositis with Interstitial Lung Disease and Multisystem Involvement: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis (DM) is a type of inflammatory myopathy of unknown origin that is marked by weakness in the proximal muscles, skin manifestations, and involvement of other systems. The existence of anti-transcription intermediary factor-1 gamma (anti-TIF1 γ) antibodies identifies a specific subgroup linked to cancer, interstitial lung disease (ILD), and unusual clinical presentations. We present a rare and complex case of DM positive for anti-TIF1 γ antibodies, which manifested as inflammatory myopathy, ILD, neuropathy, symptoms of sicca syndrome, and gastrointestinal involvement in an elderly woman with various other health issues. A 69-year-old female patient with progressive weakness in her proximal muscles, joint pain, difficulty swallowing, dry eyes and mouth, a persistent cough, and weight loss. Laboratory tests showed anemia, raised inflammatory markers, a positive antinuclear antibody test, (RF) Rheumatoid Factor, (Anti-CCP) Anti-Cyclic Citrullinated Peptide, and a strongly positive anti-TIF1 γ antibody result. A magnetic resonance imaging of her bilateral thighs indicated signs of inflammatory myositis, while a high-resolution computed tomography (CT) scan of the chest revealed an ILD pattern that was non-(UIP) Usual Interstitial Pneumonia, suggesting the presence of follicular bronchiolitis. Nerve conduction tests indicated sensory-motor axonal neuropathy. A positron emission tomography-CT scan revealed no signs of metabolically active cancer. The patient was diagnosed with anti-TIF1 γ-positive DM featuring ILD and multiple system involvement and began immunosuppressive treatment. This case underscores the diagnostic challenges associated with anti-TIF1 γ DM, particularly in the absence of cancer, and highlights the necessity of a multidisciplinary care approach. Early recognition of antibody-specific manifestations is crucial for proper assessment, outcome prediction, and treatment. Résumé La dermatomyosite (DM) est une myopathie inflammatoire idiopathique caractérisée par une faiblesse musculaire proximale, des manifestations cutanées et une atteinte multisystémique. Les anticorps anti-facteur intermédiaire de transcription 1 gamma (anti-TIF1γ) définissent un sous-groupe particulier associé à un risque accru de cancer, à une atteinte pulmonaire interstitielle et à des présentations cliniques atypiques. Nous rapportons le cas d’une femme de 69 ans présentant une faiblesse musculaire progressive, une pneumopathie interstitielle, une neuropathie sensitivo-motrice, des symptômes de syndrome sec et une atteinte gastro-intestinale, avec une forte positivité des anticorps anti-TIF1γ, sans preuve de malignité au PET-TDM. L’IRM des cuisses a confirmé une myosite inflammatoire et la TDM thoracique haute résolution a montré une pneumopathie interstitielle de type non-UIP. La patiente a été traitée par un traitement immunosuppresseur. Ce cas souligne l’importance d’une reconnaissance précoce des manifestations spécifiques des anticorps et d’une surveillance continue du risque de cancer.

items.title: Dual BAFF and APRIL inhibition with TACI-Fc depletes IgA plasma cells and ameliorates lupus nephritis.
items.abstract: B cell activating factor (BAFF) and APRIL play an important role in driving systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) immunopathogenesis and kidney damage in lupus nephritis (LN); however, the underlying immune mechanisms contributing to disease pathology are poorly understood. To investigate molecular profiles during the progression of LN, we carried out gene expression analysis on kidneys and spleens from lupus-prone NZM2328 mice treated for 4 weeks from the time of disease onset with BAFF and BAFF/APRIL inhibitors. Inhibition of BAFF alone had a limited impact on gene expression profiles of diseased mice. However, targeting both BAFF and APRIL through competitive inhibition with a transmembrane activator and CAML interactor (TACI)-Fc fusion protein significantly altered immune populations in the spleen, depleted IgA plasma cells, and also decreased inflammation in the kidneys of diseased mice. The impact of targeting both members of the BAFF family of cytokines in lupus-prone NZM2328 mice provides support for its application in the treatment of human LN.

items.titleZh: 双重BAFF和APRIL抑制通过TACI-Fc耗竭IgA浆细胞并改善狼疮肾炎。
items.abstractZh: B细胞激活因子（BAFF）和APRIL在驱动系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）免疫发病机制和狼疮肾炎（LN）肾损伤中发挥重要作用；然而，导致疾病病理的潜在免疫机制尚不清楚。为了研究LN进展过程中的分子特征，我们对自发病起用BAFF和BAFF/APRIL抑制剂治疗4周的狼疮易感NZM2328小鼠的肾脏和脾脏进行了基因表达分析。单独抑制BAFF对患病小鼠的基因表达谱影响有限。然而，通过跨膜激活剂和CAML相互作用子（TACI）-Fc融合蛋白竞争性抑制同时靶向BAFF和APRIL，显著改变了脾脏中的免疫群体，耗竭了IgA浆细胞，并减轻了患病小鼠肾脏的炎症。在狼疮易感NZM2328小鼠中同时靶向BAFF细胞因子家族两个成员的影响为其在人类LN治疗中的应用提供了支持。

items.title: Mesenteric Involvement in Large-Vessel Giant Cell Arteritis: Why PET-CT Findings Should Be Paired With Objective Ischemia-Risk and Gastrointestinal Follow-Up Reporting.
items.abstract: PET-CT is valuable for identifying large-vessel giant cell arteritis with mesenteric involvement, but case-based learning is strengthened when vascular uptake is paired with objective ischemia-risk assessment, gastrointestinal monitoring, and longer follow-up. Future reports should distinguish mesenteric arteritis, bowel ischemia, colitis, and functional gastrointestinal symptoms with reproducible clinical, biochemical, endoscopic, and imaging endpoints.

items.titleZh: 大血管巨细胞动脉炎的肠系膜受累：为何PET-CT结果应与客观缺血风险和胃肠道随访报告配对
items.abstractZh: PET-CT对于识别伴有肠系膜受累的大血管巨细胞动脉炎具有价值，但当血管摄取与客观缺血风险评估、胃肠道监测和更长的随访配对时，基于病例的学习会得到加强。未来的报告应使用可重复的临床、生化、内镜和影像学终点，区分肠系膜动脉炎、肠缺血、结肠炎和功能性胃肠道症状。

items.title: Janus kinase inhibitor use and incident dry eye disease in rheumatoid arthritis: a real-world cohort study.
items.abstract: To examine the association between systemic Janus kinase (JAK) inhibitor use and the incidence of newly diagnosed dry eye disease (DED) in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA). This multi-institutional retrospective cohort study used de-identified electronic health records from the United States Collaborative Network. Adults aged 18 years or older with RA were categorized according to systemic JAK inhibitor use or non-use. A secondary active-comparator analysis compared JAK inhibitor users with rituximab-treated patients. Propensity score matching was performed to balance demographic characteristics, comorbidities, medication history, ocular conditions, and healthcare utilization. The primary outcome was newly diagnosed DED. Time-to-event analyses were conducted using Kaplan-Meier methods and Cox proportional hazards models. A total of 25,149 JAK inhibitor users and 150,250 non-users with RA were identified. After matching, each cohort contained 23,343 patients with balanced baseline characteristics. JAK inhibitor use was associated with a lower incidence of newly diagnosed DED compared with non-use within 1 year of follow-up (hazard ratio [HR], 0.633; 95% CI, 0.545-0.736). In the secondary active-comparator analysis, 6,637 JAK inhibitor users were matched to 6,637 rituximab-treated patients, and JAK inhibitor use remained associated with a lower incidence of newly diagnosed DED (HR, 0.613; 95% CI, 0.476-0.791). Individual-agent analyses showed directionally consistent associations for tofacitinib and upadacitinib. Findings were consistent across sensitivity analyses using varying follow-up durations and landmark definitions. In this large real-world cohort study, JAK inhibitor use was associated with a lower incidence of newly diagnosed DED among patients with RA, with similar findings in a rituximab active-comparator analysis. However, the observational design, residual confounding, and coding-based outcome definition preclude causal inference. Prospective studies incorporating standardized ocular surface assessments and direct RA disease activity measures are needed to clarify the clinical relationship between systemic JAK inhibition and DED.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中Janus激酶抑制剂使用与干眼症发病的关联：一项真实世界队列研究
items.abstractZh: 探讨系统性Janus激酶（JAK）抑制剂使用与类风湿关节炎（RA）患者新诊断干眼症（DED）发病率之间的关联。这项多机构回顾性队列研究使用了来自美国协作网络的去标识化电子健康记录。将18岁及以上RA成人患者根据是否使用系统性JAK抑制剂进行分类。一项二次活性对照分析比较了JAK抑制剂使用者与利妥昔单抗治疗患者。进行倾向评分匹配以平衡人口统计学特征、合并症、用药史、眼部状况和医疗资源利用。主要结局为新诊断DED。采用Kaplan-Meier方法和Cox比例风险模型进行时间-事件分析。共识别出25,149名JAK抑制剂使用者和150,250名非使用者RA患者。匹配后，每个队列包含23,343名患者，基线特征均衡。在1年随访期内，JAK抑制剂使用与新诊断DED发病率较低相关（风险比[HR]，0.633；95% CI，0.545-0.736）。在二次活性对照分析中，6,637名JAK抑制剂使用者与6,637名利妥昔单抗治疗患者匹配，JAK抑制剂使用仍与新诊断DED发病率较低相关（HR，0.613；95% CI，0.476-0.791）。单药分析显示托法替布和乌帕替尼的关联方向一致。在不同随访时长和界标定义的敏感性分析中结果一致。在这项大型真实世界队列研究中，JAK抑制剂使用与RA患者新诊断DED发病率较低相关，在利妥昔单抗活性对照分析中结果相似。然而，观察性设计、残余混杂和基于编码的结局定义排除了因果推断。需要纳入标准化眼表评估和直接RA疾病活动度测量的前瞻性研究来阐明系统性JAK抑制与DED之间的临床关系。

items.title: Case Report: Hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis after SARS-CoV-2 infection revealing clinically diagnosed stage IVB diffuse large B-cell lymphoma in quiescent adult-onset Still's disease.
items.abstract: Adult hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) may be triggered by infection, malignancy, or systemic inflammatory disease. Attribution is challenging when recent SARS-CoV-2 infection, quiescent adult-onset Still's disease (AOSD), and an occult B-cell clonal disorder coexist. A 71-year-old man with AOSD controlled for 14 years on low-dose methotrexate developed persistent fever and fatigue after mild SARS-CoV-2 infection. He subsequently developed cytopenias, hyperferritinemia, markedly elevated lactate dehydrogenase, diffuse FDG-avid lymphadenopathy, hepatosplenomegaly, elevated soluble interleukin-2 receptor, reduced natural killer-cell activity, and bone marrow hemophagocytosis, fulfilling HLH criteria. Broad pathogen evaluation, including blood and bone marrow metagenomic next-generation sequencing, did not identify an alternative infectious trigger. Bone marrow histopathology did not show definite tumor cells; however, flow cytometry identified monoclonal mature B cells, and peripheral-blood smear high-throughput sequencing detected lymphoma-associated mutations including MYD88, CD79B, IGLL5, PRDM1, DTX1, DUSP2, and BTG1. Multidisciplinary consultation favored probable lymphoma-associated HLH with clinically diagnosed stage IVB diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. HLH-directed therapy followed by rituximab-based lymphoma-directed chemotherapy led to transient clinical improvement, but the patient later died from infectious complications. Mild SARS-CoV-2 infection may act as a co-trigger or unmasking event rather than the sole cause of HLH. Persistent high lactate dehydrogenase and soluble interleukin-2 receptor, diffuse lymphadenopathy, clonal mature B cells, lymphoma-associated mutations, and negative broad pathogen testing should prompt evaluation for occult lymphoma-associated HLH.

items.title: Autoantibody repertoire in lupus nephritis: from pathogenic mechanisms to clinical integration for precision decision-making.
items.abstract: Lupus nephritis (LN) represents the most severe renal manifestation of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), and timely, risk-stratified intervention is essential to mitigate irreversible kidney damage and improve long-term clinical outcomes. The autoantibody repertoire not only constitutes a cornerstone of SLE diagnosis but also serves as a critical pathogenic link between systemic immune dysregulation and site-specific renal injury. This review synthesizes current evidence on established and emerging autoantibodies associated with LN, with an emphasis on their pathogenic contributions to three central mechanisms: immune complex deposition, complement system activation, and direct podocyte injury. We critically evaluate the clinical validity and utility of conventional serological markers, including anti-dsDNA and anti-C1q antibodies, for diagnosing LN, monitoring disease activity, and predicting renal flares or progression, while also elucidating the significance of distinct clinical phenotypes such as the antiphospholipid antibody profile. Furthermore, we discuss strategies for integrating multiple autoantibody indices to construct predictive models, as well as the application prospects of novel technologies enabling non-invasive liquid biopsy. Finally, the challenges and future directions of autoantibody-guided individualized therapy are discussed, with the goal of advancing precision clinical decision-making for LN.

items.titleZh: 狼疮肾炎中的自身抗体谱：从致病机制到精准决策的临床整合
items.abstractZh: 狼疮肾炎（LN）是系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）最严重的肾脏表现，及时的风险分层干预对于减轻不可逆的肾损伤和改善长期临床结局至关重要。自身抗体谱不仅是SLE诊断的基石，也是系统性免疫失调与位点特异性肾损伤之间的关键致病联系。本综述综合了与LN相关的已确定和新出现的自身抗体的现有证据，重点阐述了它们在三种核心机制中的致病作用：免疫复合物沉积、补体系统激活和直接足细胞损伤。我们批判性地评估了传统血清学标志物（包括抗dsDNA和抗C1q抗体）在诊断LN、监测疾病活动以及预测肾脏复发或进展方面的临床有效性和实用性，同时阐明了不同临床表型（如抗磷脂抗体谱）的意义。此外，我们讨论了整合多种自身抗体指标以构建预测模型的策略，以及实现无创液体活检的新技术的应用前景。最后，讨论了自身抗体引导的个体化治疗的挑战和未来方向，旨在推进LN的精准临床决策。

items.title: Extracellular vesicle-mediated immunomodulation and targeted delivery: breakthroughs and challenges in rheumatoid arthritis therapy.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic autoimmune disorder characterized by persistent synovitis, immune dysregulation, and progressive joint destruction. Its pathogenesis is multifactorial and primarily involves disruption of immune homeostasis, accompanied by sustained activation of the local inflammatory microenvironment within the joints. Adverse effects, therapeutic resistance, and suboptimal efficacy limit the effectiveness of current clinical interventions. Extracellular vesicles (EVs), including exosomes, microvesicles, and apoptotic bodies, are natural vesicular carriers with intrinsic biocompatibility, low immunogenicity, and efficient intercellular communication capacity. By delivering diverse bioactive molecules, EVs modulate immune cell activation and functional equilibrium and enable targeted delivery of therapeutic agents to RA lesion sites via surface marker modification or functional molecule engineering. This strategy represents an emerging direction in rheumatology and immunology research. This review systematically summarizes recent progress in the immunoregulatory mechanisms and targeted delivery applications of EVs in RA, examines the technical limitations and major challenges associated with clinical translation, and outlines a theoretical foundation and research perspectives for advancing precision and personalized therapeutic strategies for RA.

items.titleZh: 细胞外囊泡介导的免疫调节与靶向递送：类风湿关节炎治疗的突破与挑战
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种慢性自身免疫性疾病，以持续性滑膜炎、免疫失调和进行性关节破坏为特征。其发病机制是多因素的，主要涉及免疫稳态的破坏，并伴有关节内局部炎症微环境的持续激活。不良反应、治疗耐药性和疗效欠佳限制了当前临床干预措施的有效性。细胞外囊泡（EVs），包括外泌体、微囊泡和凋亡小体，是天然的囊泡载体，具有固有的生物相容性、低免疫原性和高效的细胞间通讯能力。通过递送多种生物活性分子，EVs调节免疫细胞活化和功能平衡，并通过表面标志物修饰或功能分子工程实现治疗药物向RA病变部位的靶向递送。这一策略代表了风湿病学和免疫学研究的新方向。本综述系统总结了EVs在RA中免疫调节机制和靶向递送应用的最新进展，探讨了临床转化相关的技术局限性和主要挑战，并为推进RA精准化和个体化治疗策略提供了理论基础和研究视角。

items.title: Duodenal tuberculosis with probable biliary involvement in primary Sjögren's syndrome mimicking pancreatobiliary malignancy: a case report.
items.abstract: Extrapulmonary tuberculosis can imitate malignancy and systemic autoimmune disease. Concurrent duodenal tuberculosis with probable biliary involvement is exceptionally uncommon and may create a high-stakes pancreatobiliary cancer mimic. A 71-year-old Han Chinese woman with primary Sjögren's syndrome and type 2 diabetes, and no recent immunosuppressive therapy, presented with polyarthralgia, intermittent fever, abdominal discomfort, anorexia, constipation, and weight loss. Laboratory testing showed systemic inflammation and a cholestatic enzyme pattern, whereas bilirubin and tumor markers remained normal. Magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography revealed diffuse bile-duct wall thickening with severe distal common bile duct stenosis, and positron emission tomography-computed tomography showed hypermetabolic duodenal thickening with multiple fluorodeoxyglucose-avid lymph nodes. The tuberculin skin test measured 15 x 12 mm at 48 and 72 hours, and interferon-gamma release assay was positive (T-N >10.00 IU/mL). Upper endoscopy demonstrated a duodenal ulcer with fistula formation, and biopsy showed ulceration, granulomatous inflammation, and one acid-fast bacillus on staining. Supraclavicular lymph-node aspiration revealed lymphocytes and multinucleated giant cells without malignant cells. Duodenal tuberculosis with nodal disease and probable, non-biopsy-proven biliary involvement was diagnosed. After discharge, she received specialist-supervised antituberculosis therapy including isoniazid 0.3 g daily, rifampicin 0.45 g daily, and levofloxacin 0.5 g daily; by January 2022, treatment had continued for more than 3 months. The initial phase structure and total treatment duration could not be reliably ascertained. Symptoms, inflammatory and cholestatic markers, endoscopic ulceration, fistula, lymph-node size, and common bile duct stenosis improved at reassessment in January 2022. Tuberculosis should remain in the differential diagnosis of fluorodeoxyglucose-avid duodenal and biliary lesions in patients with autoimmune disease, particularly when biochemical obstruction, tumor markers, and tissue pathology do not fit malignancy. Early endoscopic biopsy and accessible nodal sampling can prevent unnecessary surgery and unsafe escalation of immunosuppression.

items.titleZh: 原发性干燥综合征中疑似胆道受累的十二指肠结核模拟胰胆恶性肿瘤：一例报告
items.abstractZh: 肺外结核可模拟恶性肿瘤和系统性自身免疫性疾病。并发十二指肠结核伴疑似胆道受累极为罕见，可能造成高风险胰胆肿瘤的假象。一名71岁汉族女性，患有原发性干燥综合征和2型糖尿病，近期未接受免疫抑制治疗，表现为多关节痛、间歇性发热、腹部不适、厌食、便秘和体重减轻。实验室检查显示全身炎症和胆汁淤积酶模式，而胆红素和肿瘤标志物正常。磁共振胰胆管成像显示弥漫性胆管壁增厚伴远端胆总管重度狭窄，正电子发射断层扫描-计算机断层扫描显示高代谢十二指肠增厚伴多个氟脱氧葡萄糖高摄取淋巴结。结核菌素皮肤试验在48和72小时测量为15×12 mm，干扰素-γ释放试验阳性（T-N >10.00 IU/mL）。上消化道内镜检查显示十二指肠溃疡伴瘘管形成，活检显示溃疡、肉芽肿性炎症，染色见一根抗酸杆菌。锁骨上淋巴结穿刺显示淋巴细胞和多核巨细胞，未见恶性细胞。诊断为十二指肠结核伴淋巴结病变及疑似、未经活检证实的胆道受累。出院后，她接受了专科医生监督下的抗结核治疗，包括异烟肼每日0.3 g、利福平每日0.45 g和左氧氟沙星每日0.5 g；截至2022年1月，治疗已持续超过3个月。初始阶段结构和总治疗持续时间无法可靠确定。2022年1月复查时，症状、炎症和胆汁淤积标志物、内镜下溃疡、瘘管、淋巴结大小和胆总管狭窄均有改善。在自身免疫性疾病患者中，当生化梗阻、肿瘤标志物和组织病理学不符合恶性肿瘤时，结核应保留在氟脱氧葡萄糖高摄取十二指肠和胆道病变的鉴别诊断中。早期内镜活检和可及的淋巴结取样可避免不必要的手术和不安全的免疫抑制升级。

items.title: Pharmacovigilance assessment of gout: a real-world study using the FAERS database.
items.abstract: Drug intervention is a key method for preventing gout, various drugs have been implicated as potential risk factors in individual studies. This study aims to comprehensively identify drugs linked to the development of gout. Data were obtained from the FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS), and disproportionality analysis was employed to quantitatively assess the associations between drugs and gout. Four complementary signal detection methods-Reporting Odds Ratio (ROR), Proportional Reporting Ratio (PRR), Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Network (BCPNN), and Multi-item Gamma Poisson Shrinker (MGPS)-were utilized. To further delineate exposure-outcome relationships and identify influential predictors, least absolute shrinkage and selection operator (LASSO) logistic regression was implemented. Time-to-onset (TTO) analysis was conducted to examine the temporal dynamics between drug initiation and the occurrence of gout. Finally, a comprehensive assessment of the therapeutic indications of the drugs was performed. A total of 35 drugs were ultimately identified as potentially associated with the onset and progression of gout. Among these, several agents have been previously reported in the literature as having possible links to gout development. In addition, a number of novel candidates were detected for which evidence of an association with gout remains limited or has not been clearly established. These include Lenalidomide, Sacubitril valsartan, Ruxolitinib, Treprostinil, Octreotide, Selexipag, Rosuvastatin, Sitagliptin, Riociguat, Epoprostenol, Patiromer, Dasabuvir ombitasvir paritaprevir ritonavir, Tafamidis, Sparsentan, and Iloprost. Furthermore, TTO analysis suggested that approximately 75% of gout events occurred within 0.6 years following initiation of therapy. These pharmacotherapeutic agents are employed across diverse clinical settings, encompassing haematological malignancies, cardiovascular diseases, and pulmonary hypertension. These findings suggest the potential for targeted monitoring of drug-associated gout in clinical practice. When administering these medications, it may be crucial to regularly assess patients' uric acid levels and maintain heightened awareness for the possible onset of gout.

items.titleZh: 痛风的药物警戒评估：基于FAERS数据库的真实世界研究
items.abstractZh: 药物干预是预防痛风的关键方法，多项研究已提示多种药物可能是潜在风险因素。本研究旨在全面识别与痛风发生相关的药物。数据来源于FDA不良事件报告系统（FAERS），采用不成比例性分析定量评估药物与痛风之间的关联。使用了四种互补的信号检测方法——报告比值比（ROR）、比例报告比（PRR）、贝叶斯置信传播神经网络（BCPNN）和多项目伽马泊松收缩器（MGPS）。为进一步描述暴露-结局关系并识别有影响力的预测因素，实施了最小绝对收缩和选择算子（LASSO）逻辑回归。进行了发病时间（TTO）分析以考察药物启动与痛风发生之间的时间动态。最后，对药物的治疗适应症进行了全面评估。最终共识别出35种药物可能与痛风的发生和进展相关。其中，若干药物此前已在文献中被报道与痛风发生可能存在关联。此外，还检测到一些新候选药物，其与痛风的关联证据仍有限或尚未明确建立。这些药物包括来那度胺、沙库巴曲缬沙坦、鲁索替尼、曲前列尼尔、奥曲肽、司来帕格、瑞舒伐他汀、西格列汀、利奥西呱、依前列醇、帕替罗默、达萨布韦奥比他韦帕利瑞韦利托那韦、他法米迪斯、司帕生坦和伊洛前列素。此外，TTO分析提示约75%的痛风事件发生在治疗启动后0.6年内。这些药物治疗药物应用于多种临床场景，包括血液系统恶性肿瘤、心血管疾病和肺动脉高压。这些发现提示在临床实践中可能需要对药物相关痛风进行针对性监测。在给予这些药物时，定期评估患者尿酸水平并保持对痛风可能发生的警惕性可能至关重要。

items.title: Perioperative management of anti-TIF1-γ dermatomyositis in a patient with breast cancer: a case report.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis (DM) is a rare autoimmune disease, and its subtypes exhibit considerable heterogeneity in perioperative risk. The anti-transcription intermediary factor 1-gamma (TIF1-γ) antibody-positive subtype is particularly associated with an increased risk of underlying malignancy and poses unique anesthetic challenges because of its potential multisystem involvement. We report the perioperative anesthetic management of a 47-year-old woman with TIF1-γ antibody-positive DM complicated by breast cancer who underwent a modified radical mastectomy. The patient presented with classic cutaneous manifestations, proximal myopathy, and oropharyngeal dysphagia. Comprehensive pre-operative anesthetic assessment and meticulous perioperative management contributed to an uneventful surgical course and favorable outcome. This case highlights the marked clinical heterogeneity of DM subtypes and the corresponding differences in perioperative anesthetic risk. It also underscores the importance of recognizing the potential multisystem involvement of DM in patients undergoing anesthesia. Thorough pre-operative evaluation and individualized anesthetic management are therefore essential for optimizing perioperative outcomes.

items.titleZh: 乳腺癌患者抗TIF1-γ皮肌炎的围手术期管理：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎（DM）是一种罕见的自身免疫性疾病，其亚型在围手术期风险方面表现出相当大的异质性。抗转录中介因子1-γ（TIF1-γ）抗体阳性亚型尤其与潜在恶性肿瘤风险增加相关，并因其可能的多系统受累而带来独特的麻醉挑战。我们报告了一例47岁女性TIF1-γ抗体阳性DM合并乳腺癌患者接受改良根治性乳房切除术的围手术期麻醉管理。患者表现为典型的皮肤表现、近端肌病和口咽部吞咽困难。全面的术前麻醉评估和细致的围手术期管理有助于手术过程顺利和良好结局。本病例强调了DM亚型的显著临床异质性以及相应的围手术期麻醉风险差异。同时也强调了识别接受麻醉患者DM潜在多系统受累的重要性。因此，全面的术前评估和个体化的麻醉管理对于优化围手术期结局至关重要。

items.title: Composition of and changes in faecal microbiota in children diagnosed with oligoarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis.
items.abstract: In genetically predisposed individuals, changes in the balance of pro- and anti-inflammatory bacteria in the intestinal microbiota may affect the mucosal immune system and contribute to the development of Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis (JIA). In this study, we aimed to compare the bacterial composition of the faecal microbiota between children with newly diagnosed, untreated oligoarticular JIA and healthy children, in Türkiye. This study included 25 healthy children and 25 treatment-naive patients diagnosed with oligoarticular JIA. Targeted sequencing of the bacterial 16S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) gene was performed on the genetic material obtained from stool samples. Diversity analyses revealed that the dominant bacteria were present in similar proportions, and their distributions were similar. The number of rare species differed, and their distributions were heterogeneous. The patient group was found to have a higher abundance of Bacteroidetes and a lower Firmicutes/Bacteroidetes ratio. The relative abundance of Dialister was reduced, while Oscillibacter and Alistipes were increased in the patient group. In the patient group, we noted an increase in the Akkermansiaceae family and in the Catenibacterium, Howardella, Holdemanella, Megasphaera and Akkermansia genera, a decrease in the Clostridiaceae and Lactobacillaceae families and Lactobacillus genera. To the best of our knowledge, our study is the first of its kind conducted on this subject in Türkiye. Given that microbiota composition is influenced by geographical characteristics, our study also contributes to the literature regarding the faecal composition of JIA patients in our country. Funding Scientific Research Projects Unit of Pamukkale University.

items.titleZh: 少关节型幼年特发性关节炎患儿粪便微生物群的组成及变化
items.abstractZh: 在遗传易感个体中，肠道微生物群中促炎和抗炎细菌平衡的变化可能影响黏膜免疫系统，并促进幼年特发性关节炎（JIA）的发展。本研究旨在比较土耳其新诊断、未经治疗的少关节型JIA患儿与健康儿童粪便微生物群的细菌组成。研究纳入25名健康儿童和25名新诊断的未经治疗的少关节型JIA患儿。对粪便样本中获得的遗传物质进行细菌16S核糖体RNA（rRNA）基因靶向测序。多样性分析显示，优势细菌比例相似，分布也相似。稀有物种数量存在差异，且分布不均。患者组拟杆菌门丰度较高，厚壁菌门/拟杆菌门比值较低。患者组Dialister相对丰度降低，而Oscillibacter和Alistipes增加。患者组中，阿克曼菌科以及Catenibacterium、Howardella、Holdemanella、Megasphaera和Akkermansia属增加，而梭菌科、乳杆菌科和乳杆菌属减少。据我们所知，本研究是土耳其在该主题上的首次同类研究。鉴于微生物群组成受地理特征影响，我们的研究也为我国JIA患者粪便组成的文献做出了贡献。资助来源：帕穆卡莱大学科学研究项目单位。

items.title: Comparative treatment persistence of upadacitinib vs. tofacitinib in psoriatic arthritis: a multicenter observational study from the BIRRA cohort.
items.abstract: Real-world comparative data on treatment persistence of upadacitinib and tofacitinib in psoriatic arthritis remain limited. Because persistence reflects treatment durability, tolerability, and perceived benefit in routine practice, it may serve as a pragmatic measure of real-world effectiveness. This study aimed to compare real-world treatment persistence between upadacitinib and tofacitinib in patients with psoriatic arthritis and to identify predictors of treatment discontinuation using data from the Italian multicenter BIRRA cohort. In this retrospective, multicenter, observational study, PsA patients treated with UPA and/or TOFA were enrolled from 34 rheumatology centers. Baseline demographics, treatment details, and disease activity (DAPSA) were collected. Treatment persistence was evaluated using Kaplan-Meier survival analysis. Cox proportional hazards models identified predictors of discontinuation, including sex, age, treatment line, prescription year, concomitant csDMARDs/steroids, PsA subtype (peripheral, axial, or mixed), and prior or current JAK inhibitor (JAKi) use. Among 181 enrolled patients (UPA n = 124; TOFA n = 57), retention rates at 6, 12, and 18 months were 86%, 68%, and 54% for UPA and 78%, 60%, and 60% for TOFA ( p = 0.7). Concomitant csDMARD therapy (HR: 1.92; 95% CI: 1.04-3.54; p = 0.037) and later-line treatment (HR: 1.17; 95% CI: 1.01-1.35; p = 0.034) were independently associated with higher discontinuation risk. No statistically significant differences were observed between the two JAK inhibitors. UPA demonstrated a slightly longer persistence than TOFA, though the difference was not statistically significant after adjustment. Concomitant csDMARDs and later treatment lines significantly reduced persistence. These results suggest that PsA treatment retention may be influenced more by patient- and treatment-related factors than by the specific JAK inhibitor prescribed.

items.titleZh: 乌帕替尼与托法替尼在银屑病关节炎中的治疗持续性比较：来自BIRRA队列的多中心观察性研究
items.abstractZh: 关于乌帕替尼和托法替尼在银屑病关节炎中治疗持续性的真实世界比较数据仍然有限。由于持续性反映了治疗在常规实践中的耐久性、耐受性和感知获益，它可作为真实世界有效性的实用指标。本研究旨在利用意大利多中心BIRRA队列的数据，比较银屑病关节炎患者中乌帕替尼与托法替尼的真实世界治疗持续性，并识别治疗中断的预测因素。在这项回顾性、多中心、观察性研究中，来自34个风湿病中心的PsA患者接受了UPA和/或TOFA治疗。收集了基线人口统计学、治疗细节和疾病活动度（DAPSA）。使用Kaplan-Meier生存分析评估治疗持续性。Cox比例风险模型识别了中断的预测因素，包括性别、年龄、治疗线数、处方年份、联合csDMARDs/类固醇、PsA亚型（外周型、中轴型或混合型）以及既往或当前JAK抑制剂（JAKi）使用。在181名入组患者中（UPA n = 124；TOFA n = 57），6、12和18个月的保留率分别为：UPA 86%、68%和54%；TOFA 78%、60%和60%（p = 0.7）。联合csDMARD治疗（HR: 1.92；95% CI: 1.04-3.54；p = 0.037）和后线治疗（HR: 1.17；95% CI: 1.01-1.35；p = 0.034）与较高的中断风险独立相关。两种JAK抑制剂之间未观察到统计学显著差异。UPA显示出比TOFA略长的持续性，但调整后差异无统计学意义。联合csDMARDs和后线治疗显著降低了持续性。这些结果表明，PsA治疗保留可能更多地受患者和治疗相关因素影响，而非特定的JAK抑制剂。

items.title: Coordinated oral-gut microbiota relocation in connective tissue diseases: a systematic review.
items.abstract: Alterations of the gut microbiome are well documented in connective tissue diseases, whereas the oral microbiome has largely been studied in isolation. Emerging evidence suggests coordinated dysbiosis across mucosal sites with oral-gut relocation of pathobionts occurring in animal models; however, it remains unclear whether consistent oral and gut microbiome alterations occur in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and primary Sjögren's syndrome (pSS). This review systematically synthesizes evidence on oral and gut microbiome alterations in SLE and pSS with a focus on recurrent opposing abundance patterns across anatomical sites compatible with oral-gut microbial relocation. Observational studies comparing adult patients with SLE or pSS to healthy controls and reporting oral and/or gut microbiome data were included. Interventional studies, case reports, reviews, and non-human studies were excluded. PubMed was searched from inception to November 2024. Study quality was assessed using the Newcastle-Ottawa Scale. Microbial alterations were harmonized using current NCBI taxonomy and synthesized descriptively without meta-analysis. Thirty-three studies comprising 1,385 patients and 2,131 healthy controls were included. Intestinal Shannon and Simpson α-diversity were frequently reduced, whereas oral diversity was preserved or increased. Recurrent opposing abundance patterns were observed for specific taxa, most consistently involving Streptococcus and Actinomycetota in SLE and Pseudomonadota in pSS, characterized by decreased oral and increased intestinal relative abundance. Several taxa, including Veillonella and Veillonellaceae , showed parallel enrichment across both sites. SLE and pSS are characterized by coordinated dysregulation of the oral and gut microbiomes. Opposing abundance patterns across anatomical sites support the concept of disease-associated microbial redistribution although causal inference is limited given the data was derived primarily from cross-sectional studies with relative abundances. Overall, this study highlights the oral-gut axis as an underexplored dimension of mucosal immune dysregulation in connective tissue diseases.

items.titleZh: 结缔组织疾病中口腔-肠道微生物群协调迁移：一项系统综述
items.abstractZh: 肠道微生物组的改变在结缔组织疾病中已有充分记录，而口腔微生物组大多被孤立研究。新出现的证据表明，在动物模型中，黏膜部位存在协调的菌群失调，伴随口腔-肠道致病菌迁移；然而，尚不清楚在系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）和原发性干燥综合征（pSS）中是否发生一致的口腔和肠道微生物组改变。本综述系统综合了SLE和pSS中口腔和肠道微生物组改变的证据，重点关注与口腔-肠道微生物迁移相容的跨解剖部位反复出现的丰度相反模式。纳入比较成年SLE或pSS患者与健康对照并报告口腔和/或肠道微生物组数据的观察性研究。排除干预性研究、病例报告、综述和非人类研究。检索PubMed从建库至2024年11月。使用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表评估研究质量。使用当前NCBI分类法统一微生物改变，并进行描述性综合，未进行荟萃分析。纳入33项研究，包括1,385名患者和2,131名健康对照。肠道Shannon和Simpson α多样性经常降低，而口腔多样性保持或增加。特定分类群观察到反复出现的丰度相反模式，最一致地涉及SLE中的链球菌和放线菌门以及pSS中的变形菌门，其特征为口腔相对丰度降低和肠道相对丰度增加。包括韦荣球菌属和韦荣球菌科在内的几个分类群在两个部位均显示平行富集。SLE和pSS的特征是口腔和肠道微生物组的协调失调。跨解剖部位的丰度相反模式支持疾病相关微生物再分布的概念，尽管由于数据主要来自横断面研究的相对丰度，因果推断有限。总体而言，本研究强调口腔-肠道轴是结缔组织疾病中黏膜免疫失调的一个未被充分探索的维度。

items.title: Finerenone as adjunctive therapy for residual proteinuria in lupus nephritis: a case series of 10 patients.
items.abstract: After baseline immunosuppression and renin-angiotensin system inhibitor (RASi) treatment for lupus nephritis (LN), the persistence of residual proteinuria is a core risk factor for poor renal prognosis, which is closely related to continuous progression of renal inflammation and fibrosis and long-term elevated risk of end-stage renal disease. Finerenone is a highly selective non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist (MRA) that has been proven to reduce proteinuria and exert renal protective effects in diabetic nephropathy. However, its association with proteinuria changes and safety profile in residual proteinuria of LN remain. This single-center retrospective case series enrolled 10 patients with clinically diagnosed LN who had residual proteinuria (24-h urine protein quantification ≥0.5 g) despite ≥6 months of standard treatment. Finerenone 10 mg once daily was added to the original treatment, and patients were followed for 24 weeks. The primary endpoint was change in 24-h urine protein quantification; secondary endpoints included serum albumin, estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR), and safety parameters. Data were presented as median (interquartile range, P25, P75). Repeated measurements were compared using the Friedman test with Bonferroni correction. At baseline, 12 weeks, and 24 weeks, 24-h urine protein quantification was 1.595 g (1.52, 2.37), 1.06 g (0.79, 1.63), and 0.315 g (0.27, 0.35), respectively (χ 2  = 18.20, p  < 0.001). Serum albumin showed an increase from 3.68 g/ dL (3,680 mg/dL, 3,530-3,770 mg/dL) to 4.075 g/dL (4,075 mg/dL, 3,910-4,200 mg/dL). eGFR remained stable during follow-up, changing from 108.3 mL·min -1 ·(1.73 m 2 ) -1 (88.3, 112.3) to 113.95 mL·min -1 ·(1.73 m 2 ) -1 (96.6, 119.7). All patients completed the 24-week follow-up. In this case series, add-on low-dose finerenone (10 mg/d) was associated with a significant reduction in residual proteinuria, an increase in serum albumin, stable renal function, and favorable safety in LN patients. These observational findings require validation in controlled trials.

items.titleZh: 非奈利酮作为狼疮性肾炎残余蛋白尿的辅助治疗：10例患者病例系列
items.abstractZh: 在狼疮性肾炎（LN）的基线免疫抑制和肾素-血管紧张素系统抑制剂（RASi）治疗后，残余蛋白尿的持续存在是肾脏预后不良的核心风险因素，与肾脏炎症和纤维化的持续进展以及终末期肾病风险的长期升高密切相关。非奈利酮是一种高选择性非甾体盐皮质激素受体拮抗剂（MRA），已被证明在糖尿病肾病中可减少蛋白尿并发挥肾脏保护作用。然而，其在LN残余蛋白尿中的蛋白尿变化和安全性尚不清楚。本单中心回顾性病例系列纳入了10例临床诊断为LN且经≥6个月标准治疗后仍有残余蛋白尿（24小时尿蛋白定量≥0.5 g）的患者。在原有治疗基础上加用非奈利酮10 mg每日一次，随访24周。主要终点是24小时尿蛋白定量的变化；次要终点包括血清白蛋白、估算肾小球滤过率（eGFR）和安全性参数。数据以中位数（四分位距，P25, P75）表示。重复测量采用Friedman检验进行Bonferroni校正比较。基线、12周和24周时，24小时尿蛋白定量分别为1.595 g（1.52, 2.37）、1.06 g（0.79, 1.63）和0.315 g（0.27, 0.35）（χ² = 18.20, p < 0.001）。血清白蛋白从3.68 g/dL（3,680 mg/dL, 3,530-3,770 mg/dL）升高至4.075 g/dL（4,075 mg/dL, 3,910-4,200 mg/dL）。随访期间eGFR保持稳定，从108.3 mL·min⁻¹·(1.73 m²)⁻¹（88.3, 112.3）变为113.95 mL·min⁻¹·(1.73 m²)⁻¹（96.6, 119.7）。所有患者均完成24周随访。在本病例系列中，加用低剂量非奈利酮（10 mg/d）与LN患者残余蛋白尿显著减少、血清白蛋白升高、肾功能稳定和安全性良好相关。这些观察性发现需在对照试验中验证。

items.title: Increased optic nerve-region [ 18 F]FDG uptake in clinically isolated polymyalgia rheumatica: an exploratory PET/CT study within the GCA-PMR spectrum.
items.abstract: Polymyalgia rheumatica (PMR) and giant cell arteritis (GCA) are considered part of a shared disease spectrum. While orbital inflammatory changes have been described in GCA, the presence of increased optic nerve-region metabolic activity in PMR remains unclear. This study aimed to evaluate canalicular optic nerve-region [ 18 F]FDG uptake in patients with clinically isolated PMR. In this retrospective single-center study, PMR patients (without signs and symptoms of GCA), who underwent [ 18 F]FDG PET/CT were included. [ 18 F]FDG uptake in the canalicular optic nerve region was quantified using SUV max , SUV mean and target-to-background ratios (TBR). Patients with unremarkable [ 18 F]FDG PET/CT served as controls, and patients with GCA were included for comparison. PMR patients ( n  = 18) showed significantly higher optic nerve-region [ 18 F]FDG uptake compared to controls (median TBR 5.5 [IQR 2.8 - 8.9] vs 2.2 [1.9 - 2.7], p  = 0.0006). Patients without immunosuppressive therapy demonstrated higher uptake than treated patients. Notably, untreated PMR patients showed canalicular optic nerve-region uptake values comparable to those observed in active GCA (7.3 [5.9 - 9.8] vs 8.0 [5.2 - 10.0], p  = 0.9799). No PMR patient reported visual symptoms. Patients with clinically isolated PMR showed increased [ 18 F]FDG uptake in the canalicular optic nerve region compared with controls, particularly in the absence of immunosuppressive therapy. Uptake values in untreated PMR overlapped with those observed in active GCA. These exploratory findings are compatible with subclinical inflammatory involvement within the GCA-PMR spectrum, but subclinical cranial GCA and non-neural sources of FDG uptake cannot be excluded. Larger prospective studies are required.

items.titleZh: 临床孤立性风湿性多肌痛患者视神经区域[18F]FDG摄取增加：一项GCA-PMR谱系内的探索性PET/CT研究
items.abstractZh: 风湿性多肌痛（PMR）和巨细胞动脉炎（GCA）被认为是共同疾病谱系的一部分。虽然GCA中已描述过眼眶炎症改变，但PMR中视神经区域代谢活性增加的情况仍不清楚。本研究旨在评估临床孤立性PMR患者的管状视神经区域[18F]FDG摄取。在这项回顾性单中心研究中，纳入了无GCA症状和体征的PMR患者，并进行了[18F]FDG PET/CT检查。使用SUVmax、SUVmean和靶本比（TBR）对管状视神经区域的[18F]FDG摄取进行量化。以[18F]FDG PET/CT无异常的患者作为对照组，并纳入GCA患者进行比较。PMR患者（n=18）的视神经区域[18F]FDG摄取显著高于对照组（中位TBR 5.5 [IQR 2.8-8.9] vs 2.2 [1.9-2.7]，p=0.0006）。未接受免疫抑制治疗的患者摄取高于已治疗患者。值得注意的是，未经治疗的PMR患者管状视神经区域摄取值与活动性GCA患者相当（7.3 [5.9-9.8] vs 8.0 [5.2-10.0]，p=0.9799）。无PMR患者报告视觉症状。临床孤立性PMR患者管状视神经区域的[18F]FDG摄取较对照组增加，尤其在未接受免疫抑制治疗时。未经治疗的PMR患者摄取值与活动性GCA患者重叠。这些探索性发现与GCA-PMR谱系内的亚临床炎症受累一致，但不能排除亚临床颅脑GCA和非神经来源的FDG摄取。需要更大规模的前瞻性研究。

items.title: Mechanism of HIF-1α-mediated angiogenesis in rheumatoid arthritis and progress of natural medicine interventions.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic autoimmune disease characterized by hyperplasia of synovial pannus and progressive joint destruction. Pathological angiogenesis, driven by hypoxia-inducible factor-1α (HIF-1α), constitutes a core pathological mechanism and has become a critical therapeutic target for RA. This article systematically elucidates the molecular mechanisms by which HIF-1α drives pathological angiogenesis through interactions with signaling pathways such as vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), angiogenin (ANG)-1/2, CXC chemokine ligand 12 (CXCL12)/CXC chemokine receptor 4 (CXCR4), phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase (PI3K)/protein kinase B (Akt)/mammalian target of rapamycin (mTOR). HIF-1α-mediated angiogenesis forms a positive feedback network with pathological processes including synovial inflammatory response, glycolytic metabolic reprogramming, and oxidative stress-mitochondrial damage, collectively promoting synovial pannus formation. Additionally, this article summarizes the effects of traditional Chinese medicine formulations and plant-derived monomeric metabolites on HIF-1α-mediated RA synovial angiogenesis, as well as the preclinical research advances of anti-angiogenic mechanisms. It also briefly explores the potential of novel botanical drugs delivery systems in enhancing the targeting of natural products to the HIF-1α pathway and improving therapeutic efficacy, aiming to provide new perspectives and strategic options for HIF-1α-targeted RA therapies.

items.titleZh: HIF-1α介导的类风湿关节炎血管生成机制及天然药物干预进展
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种以滑膜血管翳增生和进行性关节破坏为特征的慢性自身免疫性疾病。由缺氧诱导因子-1α（HIF-1α）驱动的病理性血管生成构成核心病理机制，并已成为RA的关键治疗靶点。本文系统阐述了HIF-1α通过与血管内皮生长因子（VEGF）、血管生成素（ANG）-1/2、CXC趋化因子配体12（CXCL12）/CXC趋化因子受体4（CXCR4）、磷脂酰肌醇3-激酶（PI3K）/蛋白激酶B（Akt）/哺乳动物雷帕霉素靶蛋白（mTOR）等信号通路相互作用驱动病理性血管生成的分子机制。HIF-1α介导的血管生成与滑膜炎症反应、糖酵解代谢重编程和氧化应激-线粒体损伤等病理过程形成正反馈网络，共同促进滑膜血管翳形成。此外，本文总结了中药复方和植物源性单体代谢物对HIF-1α介导的RA滑膜血管生成的影响，以及抗血管生成机制的临床前研究进展。还简要探讨了新型植物药递送系统在增强天然产物对HIF-1α通路靶向性和提高疗效方面的潜力，旨在为HIF-1α靶向RA治疗提供新视角和策略选择。

items.title: Thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura and macrophage activation syndrome secondary to Sjögren's syndrome: a case report.
items.abstract: Sjögren's syndrome (SS) is a systemic autoimmune disorder frequently associated with diverse hematological manifestations. Immune-mediated thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura (iTTP) and macrophage activation syndrome (MAS) represent rare, life-threatening complications, yet the consecutive occurrence of both conditions in the same SS patient is exceedingly rare. We report a 20-year-old female diagnosed with SS following drug-induced liver injury. In July 2023, she developed acute iTTP (0% ADAMTS13 activity, with positive inhibitory antibodies) shortly after the initiation of immunomodulatory therapy, which responded to plasma exchange and corticosteroids. In December 2023, following Mycoplasma pneumoniae infection, she presented with MAS, fulfilling seven of eight hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH)-2004 criteria. Management included high-dose methylprednisolone, etoposide, and ruxolitinib, followed by plonmarlimab (anti-granulocyte-macrophage colony-stimulating factor (GM-CSF) antibody) under a clinical trial protocol. This unique case underscores the complexity of SS-associated hematological emergencies. Based on our findings, we propose a dual-pathway hypothesis for these complications: firstly, elevated IL-6 may facilitate the thrombotic cascade in SS-associated iTTP; secondly, the interferons-Janus kinases-signal transducer and activator of transcription (IFN-JAK-STAT) pathway's aberrant activation likely creates a mechanistic intersection that predisposes SS patients to MAS. While the efficacy of targeted agents like tocilizumab, ruxolitinib, and plonmarlimab appears promising in this context, these therapeutic avenues strictly warrant further systematic investigation through larger clinical cohorts.

items.title: HLA class I-naturally presented synovial tissue peptides are recognized by CD8+ T lymphocytes from rheumatoid arthritis patients.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is an autoimmune disease resulting from a response driven by self-reactive CD4+ T cells that recognize autoantigenic peptides presented by antigen-presenting cells (APCs). Recent evidence suggests that CD8+ T cells are also important players in this process. This study aims to define the immunopeptidome of HLA class I molecules from RA synovial tissue (ST)- APCs and synovial fluid (SF)-pulsed monocyte-derived dendritic cells (DCs), and to prove the suitability of this approach to identify peptides recognized by CD8+ T cells from RA patients. HLA-ABC/peptide complexes were obtained from DCs generated from healthy subjects (HS), which were pulsed with a pool of RA SF (SF-DCs) or left unpulsed (UP-DCs), or obtained directly from RA ST. Isolated peptides were sequenced by mass spectrometry. The autoantigenicity of a set of ten peptides selected from this repertoire was estimated by their ability to activate CD8+ T cells from RA patients, as measured by the induction of intracellular IFN-γ expression and surface exposure of CD107a by flow cytometry. Between 107 to 663 peptides were obtained from DC samples, while over 3, 500 class I peptides were identified from each ST sample. The number of peptides was narrowed down based on prioritization steps that included the selection of sequences derived from RA-relevant, immune-related proteins, for further CD8+ T-cell stimulation assays. The frequencies of CD8+ T cells co-stained for IFN-γ and CD107a were significantly higher in RA patients than in HS in response to peptides derived from the proteins MIF, ETS1, USF1, VIM, and AHR. In the present work, we validated the use of an immunopeptidomic strategy to identify a series of novel autoantigenic CD8+ T-cell epitopes for RA, derived from synovial, mostly immune-related proteins, which may be useful for future clinical applications.

items.title: Association Between Rheumatoid Arthritis and Survival After Cancer: A Systematic Literature Review and Meta-analysis.
items.abstract: Evidence on cancer outcomes in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is limited and conflicting. We conducted a systematic review to evaluate the association between RA and overall survival among patients with cancer. A comprehensive literature search from inception through November 2024 identified observational studies evaluating mortality after cancer diagnosis in patients with RA. Study quality was assessed using the Newcastle-Ottawa Scale, and mortality estimates (RA with cancer vs cancer alone) were pooled using inverse variance weighting and random effects models in RevMan. Twenty studies met our eligibility criteria. A total of 59,299 patients with both RA and any type of cancer were included, whereas 1,761,008 patients with cancer only were included. Compared with patients with cancer alone, those with RA and cancer did not have a significant difference in mortality (pooled hazard ratio [HR] 1.13; 95% confidence interval [CI] 0.90-1.42). There was significantly worse survival in patients with RA and lung cancer (HR 1.22; 95% CI 1.01-1.46), RA and hematologic malignancies (HR 1.20; 95% CI 1.04-1.37), and RA and breast cancer (pooled HR 1.41; 95% CI 1.22-1.63). Results for other cancer types were inconclusive across studies. All studies were of generally good quality, and no major publication bias was identified. Patients with both RA and cancer overall do not experience poorer survival compared to patients with cancer alone. However, survival significantly worsens for patients with RA with lung, hematologic, or breast malignancies. Future prospective studies are warranted to elucidate underlying mechanisms and optimize cancer management strategies in RA.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎与癌症后生存的关联：系统文献综述和荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 关于类风湿关节炎（RA）患者癌症结局的证据有限且存在矛盾。我们进行了一项系统综述，以评估RA与癌症患者总生存之间的关联。通过从建库至2024年11月的全面文献检索，识别了评估RA患者癌症诊断后死亡率的观察性研究。使用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表评估研究质量，并在RevMan中采用逆方差加权和随机效应模型合并死亡率估计值（RA合并癌症 vs 仅癌症）。20项研究符合纳入标准。共纳入59,299例同时患有RA和任何类型癌症的患者，以及1,761,008例仅患有癌症的患者。与仅患癌症的患者相比，RA合并癌症患者的死亡率无显著差异（合并风险比[HR] 1.13；95%置信区间[CI] 0.90-1.42）。RA合并肺癌（HR 1.22；95% CI 1.01-1.46）、RA合并血液系统恶性肿瘤（HR 1.20；95% CI 1.04-1.37）以及RA合并乳腺癌（合并HR 1.41；95% CI 1.22-1.63）患者的生存显著更差。其他癌症类型的结果在各研究中不一致。所有研究质量普遍良好，未发现重大发表偏倚。总体而言，同时患有RA和癌症的患者与仅患癌症的患者相比，生存并未更差。然而，RA合并肺癌、血液系统恶性肿瘤或乳腺癌患者的生存显著恶化。未来有必要开展前瞻性研究以阐明潜在机制并优化RA患者的癌症管理策略。

items.title: The value of antinuclear antibody spectrum in diagnosis and disease activity assessment in early atypical systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: To explore the value of antinuclear antibody spectrum(ANAs) in diagnosis and disease activity assessment in early atypical systemic lupus erythematosus(SLE). A retrospective analysis was conducted on the clinical data of 77 patients with early atypical SLE(the SLE group) from January 2023 to June 2025 in Affiliated Hospital of Hebei University, while the clinical data from 40 patients with other rheumatic diseases during the same period were selected as the non-SLE group. All 117 patients underwent serum ANAs detection using immunoblotting to compare the diagnostic value of the ANAs and combination detection for SLE. The 77 SLE patients were divided into the active(n= 43) and non-active disease(n= 34) groups following the SLE Disease Activity Index(SLEDAI), with multivariate logistic regression analysis adopted to identify risk factors affecting disease activity in SLE patients. The positivity rates of ANA, anti-dsDNA, anti-Sm, anti-AunA, anti-SSA, anti-SSB, and anti-rRNP in the SLE group were significantly higher than those in the non-SLE group( P < 0.05), with no significant differences in the positivity rates of anti-SCL-70 and anti-Jo-1 between the two groups( P > 0.05). Meanwhile, the specificity of serum ANAs antibodies was high, with anti-Jo-1 showing the highest specificity at 100%. The multivariate logistic regression analysis indicated that positive anti-dsDNA and anti-AnuA were independent risk factors affecting disease activity in SLE patients( P < 0.05). ANAs is of significant value in diagnosis and disease activity assessment in early atypical SLE. More accurate diagnostic and clinical assessment references could be provided through the detection of various ANAs antibodies and their combinations, along with multivariate analysis.

items.titleZh: 抗核抗体谱在早期不典型系统性红斑狼疮诊断和疾病活动性评估中的价值
items.abstractZh: 探讨抗核抗体谱（ANAs）在早期不典型系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）诊断和疾病活动性评估中的价值。对2023年1月至2025年6月在河北大学附属医院就诊的77例早期不典型SLE患者（SLE组）的临床资料进行回顾性分析，同时选取同期40例其他风湿性疾病患者的临床资料作为非SLE组。所有117例患者均采用免疫印迹法检测血清ANAs，比较ANAs及联合检测对SLE的诊断价值。根据SLE疾病活动指数（SLEDAI）将77例SLE患者分为活动组（n=43）和非活动组（n=34），采用多因素logistic回归分析确定影响SLE患者疾病活动性的危险因素。SLE组ANA、抗dsDNA、抗Sm、抗AunA、抗SSA、抗SSB和抗rRNP阳性率显著高于非SLE组（P<0.05），两组抗SCL-70和抗Jo-1阳性率差异无统计学意义（P>0.05）。同时，血清ANAs抗体特异性高，其中抗Jo-1特异性最高，达100%。多因素logistic回归分析显示，抗dsDNA阳性和抗AnuA阳性是影响SLE患者疾病活动性的独立危险因素（P<0.05）。ANAs在早期不典型SLE的诊断和疾病活动性评估中具有重要价值。通过检测多种ANAs抗体及其组合，并结合多因素分析，可为临床提供更准确的诊断和评估参考。

items.title: Differentiating Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis From Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia in Children: A Multidisciplinary Diagnostic Approach, Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: Juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) and acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) share overlapping musculoskeletal presentations in pediatric patients, and the misclassification of ALL as JIA carries life-threatening consequences due to inappropriate initiation of corticosteroid or immunosuppressive therapy. A rigorous synthesis of contemporary evidence identifying the most reliable clinical and laboratory discriminators between these two conditions is long overdue. This systematic review and meta-analysis aimed to evaluate clinical, laboratory, and biomarker-based features that differentiate ALL from JIA in pediatric patients. The primary focus was on studies published between January 2021 and April 2026, while selectively incorporating seminal pre-2021 studies with major diagnostic relevance and extractable comparative data to strengthen quantitative synthesis. A comprehensive search of PubMed, EMBASE, Web of Science, CINAHL, and Cochrane Library was conducted using pre-specified search terms. Two independent reviewers screened titles, abstracts, and full texts. Methodological quality was assessed with the Newcastle-Ottawa Scale (NOS). Pooled odds ratios (ORs) were estimated under a random-effects model (DerSimonian-Laird), and heterogeneity was quantified using the I 2 statistic. Publication bias was evaluated with Egger regression and visual inspection of funnel plots. Eighteen studies were included in the qualitative synthesis, of which 12 primary comparative studies contributed quantitative data to the meta-analysis, encompassing 5,198 pediatric patients across 12 countries. Thrombocytopenia (platelets < 100 × 10 9 /L) demonstrated the highest diagnostic weight, with a pooled OR of 108.4 (95% CI: 58.2-201.7; I 2 = 34.2%), followed closely by neutropenia (pooled OR = 103.6; 95% confidence interval (CI): 55.9-192.0; I 2 = 31.7%) and anemia (pooled OR = 57.4; 95% CI: 22.1-149.0; I 2 = 41.6%). Limb pain disproportionate to physical findings, nocturnal bone pain, hepatosplenomegaly, and elevated lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) were additional independent predictors. Novel biomarkers including S100A9 and S100A12 showed markedly reduced levels in ALL compared to JIA (area under the curve (AUC) = 0.91). No evidence of significant publication bias was detected. The triad of thrombocytopenia, neutropenia, and anemia constitutes the most powerful hematological screening strategy for distinguishing ALL from JIA in children presenting with arthropathy. Bone marrow aspiration should be pursued without hesitation when two or more cell lines are affected. Clinicians must resist initiating immunosuppressive therapy before excluding an underlying malignancy, particularly when pain is nocturnal, disproportionate to findings, or associated with weight loss and organomegaly.

items.titleZh: 儿童幼年特发性关节炎与急性淋巴细胞白血病的鉴别：多学科诊断方法、系统评价与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 幼年特发性关节炎（JIA）和急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）在儿科患者中表现出重叠的肌肉骨骼表现，将ALL误分类为JIA会因不当启动皮质类固醇或免疫抑制治疗而带来危及生命的后果。对识别这两种疾病之间最可靠的临床和实验室鉴别指标的当代证据进行严格综合早已刻不容缓。本系统评价与荟萃分析旨在评估区分儿科患者ALL与JIA的临床、实验室及生物标志物特征。主要关注2021年1月至2026年4月间发表的研究，同时有选择地纳入2021年前具有重大诊断相关性且包含可提取比较数据的开创性研究，以加强定量综合。使用预先指定的检索词对PubMed、EMBASE、Web of Science、CINAHL和Cochrane图书馆进行了全面检索。两名独立评审员筛选了标题、摘要和全文。采用纽卡斯尔-渥太华量表（NOS）评估方法学质量。在随机效应模型（DerSimonian-Laird）下估计合并比值比（OR），并使用I²统计量量化异质性。通过Egger回归和漏斗图目视检查评估发表偏倚。18项研究纳入定性综合，其中12项主要比较研究为荟萃分析提供了定量数据，涵盖12个国家的5,198名儿科患者。血小板减少症（血小板 < 100 × 10⁹/L）显示出最高的诊断权重，合并OR为108.4（95% CI: 58.2-201.7；I² = 34.2%），紧随其后的是中性粒细胞减少症（合并OR = 103.6；95%置信区间（CI）: 55.9-192.0；I² = 31.7%）和贫血（合并OR = 57.4；95% CI: 22.1-149.0；I² = 41.6%）。与体格检查结果不成比例的肢体疼痛、夜间骨痛、肝脾肿大和乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）升高是额外的独立预测因子。新型生物标志物包括S100A9和S100A12在ALL中水平显著低于JIA（曲线下面积（AUC）= 0.91）。未检测到显著发表偏倚的证据。血小板减少症、中性粒细胞减少症和贫血三联征是区分表现为关节病的儿童ALL与JIA的最强效血液学筛查策略。当两个或以上细胞系受累时，应毫不犹豫地进行骨髓穿刺。临床医生在排除潜在恶性肿瘤之前必须抵制启动免疫抑制治疗，尤其是当疼痛为夜间性、与检查结果不成比例，或伴有体重减轻和器官肿大时。

items.title: Systemic Sclerosis Presenting With Chronic Atrophic Gastritis and Retinal Artery Occlusion: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc), also known as scleroderma, is a rare autoimmune disease characterized by fibroproliferative changes, vascular dysfunction, and small-vessel proliferation. It can affect multiple organ systems, including the gastrointestinal tract, skin, heart, eyes, kidneys, and lungs. We report a case of a 67-year-old woman with systemic sclerosis who tested negative for specific antibodies and simultaneously developed two rare complications: autoimmune atrophic gastritis resulting in megaloblastic anemia and acute retinal artery occlusion. Notably, she presented with megaloblastic anemia despite normal serum vitamin B12 levels, consistent with early deficiency due to parietal cell destruction and reduced intrinsic factor production. This case emphasizes the importance of recognizing uncommon gastrointestinal and ocular manifestations in systemic sclerosis, as timely diagnosis and management are essential to prevent serious complications such as severe anemia and permanent vision loss.

items.titleZh: 以慢性萎缩性胃炎和视网膜动脉闭塞为首发表现的系统性硬化症：一例报告
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc），也称为硬皮病，是一种罕见的自身免疫性疾病，其特征为纤维增生性改变、血管功能障碍和小血管增生。它可影响多个器官系统，包括胃肠道、皮肤、心脏、眼睛、肾脏和肺部。我们报告一例67岁女性系统性硬化症患者，其特异性抗体检测阴性，同时出现两种罕见并发症：自身免疫性萎缩性胃炎导致巨幼细胞性贫血和急性视网膜动脉闭塞。值得注意的是，尽管血清维生素B12水平正常，她仍出现巨幼细胞性贫血，这与壁细胞破坏和内因子生成减少导致的早期缺乏一致。本病例强调了识别系统性硬化症中不常见的胃肠道和眼部表现的重要性，因为及时诊断和管理对于预防严重贫血和永久性视力丧失等严重并发症至关重要。

items.title: Racial Differences in Age at Diagnosis and Renal Manifestations of Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody (ANCA)-Associated Vasculitis: Insights From a Multi-institutional Electronic Health Record Retrospective Cohort.
items.abstract: Antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (AAV) is a rare autoimmune disease in which renal involvement is a major determinant of morbidity and mortality. Epidemiologic data suggest lower reported prevalence of AAV among Black populations, but whether differences exist in disease presentation and renal severity at diagnosis remains poorly characterized. We conducted a retrospective cohort study using a large, multi-institutional electronic health record network. Adults diagnosed with AAV between 2015 and 2025 were identified using International Classification of Diseases, Tenth Revision (ICD-10) codes. Demographic characteristics, renal manifestations at presentation, dialysis dependence, and ANCA serologic testing were extracted. Primary analyses compared Black and White patients using descriptive statistics, Welch t-tests, Fisher's exact tests, and odds ratios (ORs) with 95% confidence intervals (CIs). Among 789 adults with AAV, 84.8% were White and 8.2% were Black. Black patients were diagnosed at a younger mean age than White patients (55 ± 15 vs 64 ± 16 years; p<0.001). Dialysis dependence was more frequent among Black patients (21.5% vs 13.3%; OR: 1.79, CI: 0.88-3.45), as was hematuria (38.5% vs 28.1%; OR: 1.59, CI: 0.9-2.78). Proteinuria occurred at similar rates across groups. ANCA serologic testing was incompletely captured. In this multi-institutional cohort, Black patients with AAV presented at a younger age and tended to be more likely to require dialysis and have hematuria. These findings suggest that underrepresentation in rare disease cohorts may coexist with substantial disease burden at presentation, underscoring the importance of examining severity alongside prevalence in population-level studies.
